text: Here's what science actually says about attachment theory basics. Attachment theory explains how early relationships shape our emotional life. Secure, anxious, avoidant—these styles influence our bonds. Studies show secure attachments lead to healthier relationships. But preliminary research hints at even deeper connections. How about your attachment style? Do you know it? Explore your attachment style and its impact. Like and follow for more insights!
